description_long: This object is a large, crumpled garbage bag with a glossy, multi-colored exterior featuring printed graphics and text, including a prominent bat symbol and the year '2016'. The bag appears to be made of thin, flexible plastic and is moderately full, giving it a bulging, irregular shape with many creases and folds. The surface is mostly blue with red and black areas, and the graphics suggest it may have been repurposed from a promotional or decorative plastic sheet. The top of the bag is loosely gathered, with no visible closure mechanism, leaving the opening somewhat irregular. The bag is opaque, preventing any view of its contents, and it is shown standing upright as if placed on the ground. Its overall appearance is typical of street trash found in urban environments, with a distinctive, eye-catching exterior.
description: A large, glossy, crumpled garbage bag with colorful printed graphics and text, standing upright and moderately full. The bag's surface is mostly blue with red and black, and it has no visible closure.
description_view_0: The front shows a blue surface with a white bat symbol and some text, with pronounced creases and a slightly open top.
description_view_1: This side highlights the bat symbol more centrally, with the year '2016' and more red coloration visible.
description_view_2: The bag's side is mostly blue with a partial view of the bat symbol and red areas, showing more of the bag's bulging shape.
description_view_3: The back is darker, with less visible graphics and more shadow, showing the bag's irregular, crumpled form.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: moderately full and bulging, with visible creases and an irregular shape
